entries.summary: Phase 8 completed all 7 planned tasks: service initialization hook (8.1), DocumentsPage search index wiring (8.2), ChatPage browser-local RAG pipeline (8.3), ChatPage server API mode (8.4), dead stub removal (8.5), production cleanup with keyboard shortcuts (8.6), end-to-end build verification (8.7). All acceptance criteria met. Production build passes (8.81s). 75+ new tests passing. Race condition guards added. Memory cleanup verified.
